payload.description:
As an unauthenticated viewer opening a report share URL, I want the report to load by share token without login, so that shared report links remain publicly viewable as intended.

Observed behavior (since week of 2026-04-13): AppSync request for fetchReportByShareToken fails with Unauthorized (401).

Debug scope:
- Check frontend authMode used for share-token query
- Check AppSync auth rules / resolver auth mode for share-token path
- Check recent commits in last 7-10 days for auth-related regressions
- Confirm whether API key expiry was relevant vs IAM/lambda/userPool config

Done criteria:
- Root cause identified with commit/config evidence
- Fix implemented
- Verified unauthenticated share URL works end-to-end
payload.title: Share token GraphQL request returns 401 for unauthenticated users
